final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) > 5000;

1.description: resolve Drammen kommunenummer and municipality geometry

2.description: select parcels in the municipality with area > 5000 m2

4.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to the municipality extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

6.description: deduplicate parcels and keep parcel area (max) per teigid
